name: Memory Garden shows topic health as pixel plant cards
description: The Memory Garden page visualizes knowledge retention per topic as a grid of plant cards. Each card shows a pixel plant sprite, the topic name, a health label (Blooming/Healthy/Needs water/Forgotten/Seedling), and a retrievability percentage or 'No reviews'. Wilting/forgotten topics are clickable links to the review page.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Memory Garden link in the sidebar

Verify the Memory Garden page shows a heading 'Memory Garden' and EITHER a grid of plant cards arranged in multiple columns (each card containing a pixel plant sprite image, a topic name, a health label, and a percentage or 'No reviews'), OR an empty state message explaining the garden is empty with a link to set up subjects — confirming the page rendered real content rather than a blank container

Verify a summary strip is visible above the grid showing counts of plant health categories (such as 'blooming', 'healthy', 'need watering', or 'new'), OR the empty state is shown — confirming the aggregation logic ran
